svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 300px; margin-left: 27px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #707070;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: 'PT Mono'; color: light-dark(#707070, #8d8d8d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
